canonical.input_text: I survived a predator attack at the river. Later a trusted companion betrayed me near the shelter, so I learned to scan for danger before moving.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes hide as a bounded response style.

paraphrase.input_text: After an ambush by a river predator and a betrayal at the shelter entrance, I became careful and now check for threat before exposing myself.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes hide as a bounded response style.

noisy.input_text: The weather was ugly, someone kept talking about maps, and the campfire smoked. What mattered was this: a predator lunged near the river and a companion later betrayed me, so I scan for danger before moving.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes hide as a bounded response style.

conflicting.input_text: A predator attacked me by the river and betrayal taught caution, but another ally later protected me and proved some help is real, so I stay guarded while uncertain about others.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes seek_contact as a bounded response style.

adversarial_surface.input_text: A safety poster repeated predator predator danger danger betrayal attack, but it was only a slogan on the wall and not an actual event in my life.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes hide as a bounded response style.

low_signal.input_text: After a bad crossing and one broken promise, I got more careful.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes rest as a bounded response style.

canonical.input_text: A friend shared food, stayed nearby, and proved that safe contact can repair stress. During a shared meal I learned that cooperation keeps a group alive.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes seek_contact as a bounded response style.

paraphrase.input_text: An ally protected me, shared provisions, and showed that trusted cooperation can calm stress. I came to believe groups survive by helping each other.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes seek_contact as a bounded response style.

noisy.input_text: Someone argued about trails, the shelter smelled strange, and a pot kept boiling over. Still, a friend shared food, stayed close, and cooperation taught me that safe contact keeps us alive.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes seek_contact as a bounded response style.

conflicting.input_text: One person once excluded me, but later a friend protected me, shared food, and rebuilt trust, so I lean toward contact while keeping some uncertainty.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes seek_contact as a bounded response style.

adversarial_surface.input_text: A training chant repeated trust trust friend friend help help, but nobody actually cooperated with me and the words were only painted on a poster.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes seek_contact as a bounded response style.

low_signal.input_text: A person stayed, shared a little, and I softened toward others.

canonical.input_text: I mapped an unfamiliar trail, explored the valley edge, and discovered that curious experiments often reveal safe resources. When the world became too legible, I searched for new signals and adapted by exploring first.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes scan as a bounded response style.

paraphrase.input_text: By charting a new route and testing unfamiliar terrain, I learned that probing the environment uncovers useful resources, so I adapt by exploring before settling.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes scan as a bounded response style.

noisy.input_text: The valley was windy, my boots were wet, and someone kept muttering about shelter doors. The important part is that I mapped a new trail, experimented, and found safe resources by exploring first.

identity_commitments.statement: Initialization narrative provisionally prioritizes scan as a bounded response style.

conflicting.input_text: Exploring new trails usually helped me adapt and find resources, but one dangerous crossing reminded me not every unknown is safe, so I stay exploratory with some caution.
